title: Module/Registry/Plugin/Modules/Events/Keys/Position/Output/State namespace creation + file moves
acceptance_criteria: src/Module/ created with Module.php, ImagePlacer.php, ImagePlacement.php, ModuleConfig.php, BaseModule.php, TickEpoch.php
src/Plugin/ created with Request.php, Response.php, PluginSdk.php, ExternalModule.php, Discovery.php
src/Events/ created with Event.php, EventDispatcher.php, EventHandler.php, FocusEvent.php, KeyEvent.php, MouseEvent.php, PasteEvent.php, ResizeEvent.php, Key.php, KeyAction.php, KeyMap.php, Focus.php
src/Keys/ created with KeyRegistry.php, KeyIdentifier.php, KeyMeta.php, Category.php
src/Output/ created with Truncate.php, RenderBar.php, WrapCells.php
src/State/ created with State.php (moved from Grid/State.php)
All internal use statements updated (Grid\Foo → appropriate new namespace)

notes.smaller_namespaces: These 9 namespaces are smaller than Foundation/Layout/Components/Plot. State.php had TD-1 issue (readonly+wither) - fix during move.
notes.atomic_state_persist: For State.php: tmp+rename pattern for atomic persistence. tmp := path + '.tmp', WriteFile(tmp, data), Rename(tmp, path).
